introSection: Yukon Quad is a steel launched motorbike roller coaster located at Le Pal in Dompierre Sur Besbre, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. It opened on 7 April 2018.

sections.title: Design
sections.content:
The ride is a mirror image of Juvelen at Djurs Sommerland in Nimtofte, Midtjylland, Denmark. The acces power of the first launch is transferred to a flywheel, where it is stored and used on the second launch.

The ride opened with a top speed of 90 km/h, this was later changed to 85 km/h after complaints of the ride being too intense.

fullText:
Yukon Quad is a steel launched motorbike roller coaster located at Le Pal in Dompierre Sur Besbre, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. It opened on 7 April 2018.

The ride is a mirror image of Juvelen at Djurs Sommerland in Nimtofte, Midtjylland, Denmark. The acces power of the first launch is transferred to a flywheel, where it is stored and used on the second launch.

The ride opened with a top speed of 90 km/h, this was later changed to 85 km/h after complaints of the ride being too intense.
